User.title: User Profile
User.description: Public profile information for a chat user.

Message.title: Chat Message
Message.description: A single message in a chat channel.

users/{userId}.description: User profiles indexed by their Firebase Auth UIDs.

usernames/{username}.description: Lookup table to ensure unique usernames. Maps username to UID.

channels/{channelId}/typing/{userId}.description: Real-time typing status and current draft for a user in a channel.

channels/{channelId}/messages/{messageId.description: Messages belonging to a specific channel.
